body.title: Add reasoning inspection tier to day-close-audit (engrams + Igor interview)
body.result: Added Step 18.7 reasoning inspection tier — daily engram coverage pass + weekly psych interview pass with 7-day stamp gate
body.description:
The day-close-audit currently inspects only code. Add a 'Reasoning inspection' tier with two passes: (A) engram inspection — coverage % (annotated vs. unannotated), dead code_refs, category distribution, gaps; (B) Igor interview — fixed question set covering state, uncertainty, surprises, and psychological indicators (valence trend, coherence, stress signals). Interview pass runs weekly not daily (noisy if daily); engram inspection pass runs every day-close.

This makes Igor's inner state inspectable from the outside — the cogsci angle applied as a systematic audit.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/day-close-audit skill file (or ~/.claude/skills/day-close-audit)
**Design rules:** none apply directly
**Scope boundary:** In scope: two sub-passes in audit, report section format, weekly cadence gate for interview pass. Out of scope: implementing engram annotation (T-engram-annotator-habit), implementing psych monitoring (T-igor-psych-monitoring) — this ticket only adds the audit tooling that reads what those tickets produce.
**Test plan:** Run audit once; 'Reasoning inspection' section appears in report with engram coverage stats; interview pass fires on weekly schedule; no tests needed for the audit skill itself (it's a checklist, not code).
